$Comment: The Water DamageCause is authored by the MMO Skill Tree jar's Phase I six-school roster work (unprefixed, under Elemental), NOT by this mod. Without that jar (or a pack) shipping Server/Entity/Damage/Water.json, Mmoscaling_Ward_Water.json fails EntityEffect asset validation at load and this affix logs a warn-once at apply - a known, documented degraded mode until Phase I ships.
Name: ward_water
